name: Seated Editorial Pose
commercial_use: Editorial campaign, brand story page, social launch creative
visual_goal: Create a stylish editorial image that still keeps the outfit legible.
composition: Medium-wide seated frame with angular body lines and visible garment structure.
model_direction: Sit with one knee forward, torso slightly turned, hands relaxed, expression composed.
styling_notes: Choose seating that matches the brand mood and does not hide key garment details.
lighting: Soft side light with controlled contrast and subtle shadow shape.
camera_language: 50mm to 85mm lens look, slightly lower camera height, editorial depth.
prompt: Editorial fashion photograph of a model seated in a composed pose, outfit clearly visible, refined styling, soft side lighting, tasteful shadows, modern commercial magazine mood, elegant body lines and premium garment detail.
negative_prompt: slouched awkward pose, hidden clothing, cluttered set, overdramatic makeup, distorted hands, low-quality editorial
